title: Gloriously Juicy Mexican Taleggio Tostada
description: A halal-friendly, herbal, and juicy Mexican dish featuring taleggio cheese, perfect for a sick day, with a blend of Veracruzan flavors and tandoor spices, served in a tostada form.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the shredded chicken, tandoor spice mix, and salt.
Arrange the corn tortillas on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5 minutes.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat and saute the diced red onion until softened.
Add the chopped cilantro and cook for an additional minute.
Spread a layer of the chicken mixture onto each toasted tortilla.
Top each tortilla with a slice of softened taleggio cheese.
Drizzle the lime juice over the cheese and serve immediately.
